name: Auto Username - name.surname
script:
def execute():
    import re
    import unicodedata

    def _slugify(s: str) -> str:
        s = (s or "").strip()
        if not s:
            return ""
        s = unicodedata.normalize("NFKD", s)
        s = s.encode("ascii", "ignore").decode("ascii")
        s = s.lower()
        s = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", ".", s)
        s = re.sub(r"\.+", ".", s)
        return s.strip(".")

    if getattr(doc, "name", None) in ("Administrator", "Guest"):
        return

    if getattr(doc, "username", None):
        return

    first = (getattr(doc, "first_name", None) or "").strip()
    last = (getattr(doc, "last_name", None) or "").strip()

    if first and last:
        base = f"{first}.{last}"
    else:
        full = (getattr(doc, "full_name", None) or "").strip()
        parts = [p for p in re.split(r"\s+", full) if p]
        if len(parts) < 2:
            return
        base = f"{parts[0]}.{parts[-1]}"

    base = _slugify(base)
    if not base or "." not in base:
        return

    candidate = base
    i = 2
    while frappe.db.exists("User", {"username": candidate, "name": ("!=", doc.name)}):
        candidate = f"{base}{i}"
        i += 1

    doc.username = candidate

execute()
